clips.title: Create a task
clips.accessible_caption: A focused task is entered while its repository, agent profile, worktree isolation, and start mode remain visible for review.
clips.source_scenario: Enter a focused repository task and review its launch configuration before creation.
clips.data_isolation: Disposable worker-scoped Kandev E2E instance with a fresh temporary HOME, KANDEV_HOME_DIR, SQLite database, repository, worktree root, ports, and browser profile. External providers and agent behavior are mock-only; no shared user database, existing task workspace, credential, or production service is used.

camera.framing: task composer only; host Files toolbar excluded

clips.title: Start an agent on a prepared task
